title: Sentreso Voice App — Demo
description: The AI that understands your finances. And your voice. Simplifying daily financial management — no spreadsheet, no mental math.

title: Let Your Voice Handle Your Finance
description: We tried dashboards, workflows, automation — it still felt disconnected from how people actually work. Then we tried something simple: letting people talk. No app to learn. Just: 'Where's my money today?' Sentreso is becoming mobile-first. Voice-first.

title: CLI Demo — Voice Recording & TestFlight Deploy
description: Behind the screen: building Sentreso Finance. From idea to test — the build and deployment process behind our TestFlight launch. Record your transactions by talking. No notebooks, just clarity.

title: Sentreso — From Concept to App Store
description: The journey of building Sentreso Finance from first prototype to App Store launch. Voice-first financial tracking designed for West African markets — shipping a product that meets people where they are.
